_comment: Bonus fixture per FE arch review of d48d81b — proves the auto-advance composition: a broken media URL in the middle of a sequence MUST resolve renderer.done via the error path so the experience advances instead of dead-stopping. Three items: working audio → broken audio → working audio. Conformance harness only validates the engine layer (resolved_behavior + layers); the runtime advance behavior is exercised at the renderer-level tests (renderers-content-{audio,image}-error tests). The fixture lives here so a third-party engine implementor sees the shape that triggers the rule.
name: Broken Media Mid-Sequence Conformance Fixture

items.content_title: Working item after — must be reached via auto-advance past the broken middle
